title: tragacantha lanata
intro: Tragacantha lanata, also known as woolly vetchling, is a type of plant that belongs to the pea family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha lanata include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In traditional herbal medicine, Tragacantha lanata is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
